stemHtml: In case of a radio failure while flying IFR in IMC you should…

options.a: Follow the filed flight plan and land at the destination aerodrome.
options.b: Follow the filed flight plan and land at the destination alternate aerodrome.
options.c: Continue in VMC and divert to the nearest suitable aerodrome.
options.d: Continue in IMC and divert to the nearest suitable aerodrome.
